{0x0100,0x0000} ottiene[0x000A]{0x1502,0x0001}{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}!
{0x0100,0x0000} ottiene[0x000A]{0x0200,0x0002} {0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}!
{0x0100,0x0000} ottiene[0x000A]{0x1500,0x0001}{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}!
{0x0100,0x0000} ottiene[0x000A]{0x1502,0x0001}{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}!
{0x0100,0x0000} ottiene la {0x0109,0x0001}[0x000A]che contiene {0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0107,0x0002}{0xBD01}!
{0x0100,0x0000} trova[0x000A]{0x1500,0x0001}{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}!
{0x0100,0x0000} trova[0x000A]{0x1502,0x0001}{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}!
{0x0100,0x0000} trova la {0x0109,0x0001}[0x000A]che contiene {0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0107,0x0002}{0xBD01}!
Peccato! Non c’è più spazio[0x000A]per {0x1500,0x0000}{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0000}{0xBD01}!
Ottieni {0x1502,0x0000}{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0000}{0xBD01}!{0xBE01}[0x000A]Ma non c’è più spazio nella Borsa... che peccato!
{0x0100,0x0000} mette {0x1500,0x0001}{0x0109,0x0001}[0x000A]nella {0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}tasca {0x0112,0x0002}{0xBD01}.
{0xBDFF:0x000B}
{0xBDFF:0x000C}
{0x0100,0x0000} riceve un[0x000A]{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0127,0x0001}{0xBD01}!
{0x0100,0x0000} mette al suo {0x0101,0x0002}[0x000A]il {0x0127,0x0001}!
{0x0100,0x0000} ottiene[0x000A]{0x1502,0x0001}{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}!
Non ha attirato nessun Pokémon...
{0x0100,0x0000} ottiene[0x000A]{0x1502,0x0001}{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}!
